descFull: VULNRΞPO - Free vulnerability report generator and repository, end-to-end encrypted! Templates of issues, CWE,CVE,MITRE ATT&CK,PCI DSS, import Nmap/Nessus/Burp/OpenVAS/Bugcrowd/Trivy, Jira export, TXT/JSON/MARKDOWN/HTML/DOCX, attachments, automatic changelog, stats, vulnerability management, bugbounty, local ai/llm, super fast pentest reporting!
